zh.Cuckold Manor, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾曼諾
英國英格蘭史洛普爾肯普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir, Ralph Andrews , I於1259年出生在英國波藍德卡萊爾時，他的父親Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq.27歲，母親Lady Magdalen Tokett24歲。他於大約1282年與Lady Mary Thompson在英國波藍德卡萊爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1308年在英國越可爾曼諾享年49歲。

zh-hans.Cuckold Manor, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾曼諾
英国英格兰史洛普爾肯普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir, Ralph Andrews , I于1259年出生在英国波藍德卡萊爾时，他的父亲Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq.27岁，母亲Lady Magdalen Tokett24岁。他于大约1282年与Lady Mary Thompson在英国波藍德卡萊爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1308年在英国越可爾曼諾享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir, Ralph Andrews , I was born in 1259, in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, his father, Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq., was 27 and his mother, Lady Magdalen Tokett, was 24. He married Lady Mary Thompson about 1282, in Carlisle, Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1308, in Manor, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir, Ralph Andrews , I est né en 1259, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq., avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Magdalen Tokett, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary Thompson environ 1282, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1308, à Manor, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir, Ralph Andrews , I 1259 in Carlisle, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. 27 und seine Mutter Lady Magdalen Tokett 24. Er hat um 1282 in Carlisle, Cumberland, England Lady Mary Thompson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1308 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Manor, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir, Ralph Andrews , I è nato il nel 1259 nel Carlisle, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq., aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Magdalen Tokett, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Mary Thompson circa 1282, nel Carlisle, Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1308, nel Manor, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir, Ralph Andrews , Iが1259年にイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルで生まれた時，父Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq.は27歳，母Lady Magdalen Tokettは24歳であった。約1282年にイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルでLady Mary Thompsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1308年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマノーで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir, Ralph Andrews , I(이)가 1259년 영국 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq.(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Magdalen Tokett(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1282년 영국 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 Lady Mary Thompson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1308년 영국 요르크실르 먼어에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir, Ralph Andrews , I nasceu em 1259, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq., tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Magdalen Tokett, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Mary Thompson aproximadamente 1282, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1308, em Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir, Ralph Andrews , I родился в 1259 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Magdalen Tokett, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary Thompson около 1282 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1308 г. в местности манор, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir, Ralph Andrews , I nació en 1259, en Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq., tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Magdalen Tokett, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lady Mary Thompson aproximadamente 1282, en Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1308, en Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
